verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Uganda. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (red soil, bananas, wooden poles) that was effectively utilized by the tournament judge to distinguish Uganda from its closest regional competitors (Kenya, Rwanda).
